title: Cacophobia
shortDescription: An exploration of fear, form and the human condition.
longStory: Cacophobia examines what we turn away from — and what happens when we look anyway. Oil and emotion on canvas.

title: The Conide
shortDescription: On the importance of the spectator in the art world.
longStory: The Conide is a meditation on presence — the space between artist, work and witness. A painting that asks you to stay.
